name: A Shot in the Dark

Locate the client list

description: Recover the VIP client list from Hunter's Paradise main entrance and deliver it to Banshee instead of Handshake.

name: A Single Drop

Check the first tanker truck
Check the second tanker truck
reward_text: 300 Exp, +255 Reputation with Gunny (+170 after first completion), $870 USD
description: Fuel supplies are running critically low. Recon the area around Pha Lang Airfield where two tanker trucks were last seen, locate the missing vehicles, and assess how much fuel remains.

Locate the phone in Chon village
Neutralize 5 Turncoat's former friends in Chon village
description: Eliminate the disloyal locals from Chon village who tried to extort Turncoat. Remove the threat, recover a phone they withheld, and deliver it as agreed.

name: A Voice from the Stars
objectives: Retrieve the research data and report back to Lab Rat
Locate the research data inside the hut

description: A hut containing mysterious research notes has been discovered. Search the area thoroughly for valuable intel that may clarify the purpose of the project.

name: Academic Interest
objectives: Place the merchandise in a blue barrel behind a shelter in a field southwest of Midnight Sapphire
reward_text: 300 Exp, +255 Reputation with Turncoat (+170 after first completion), $870 USD
description: Instead of delivering the narcotics at Midnight Sapphire to Banshee, collect any drugs or related evidence you find and place it inside a blue barrel behind a shelter in a field southwest of the resort.

name: Atrocity Probe

Investigate the town hall
Investigate the smoldering area

description: Reports suggest a possible massacre in the village of Ban Phouphienge, located south of Hunter's Paradise. Investigate the town hall and the smoldering area.

name: Buried on Paper
objectives: Retrieve the documents and report back to Banshee
Access Vice President Park's Office in Tiger Bay and secure any relevant files
Access the Municipal Office Building archive and secure any relevant files
description: Access Vice President Jan Park's office in the Municipal Office Building in Tiger Bay and the archive to find evidence of government corruption.

name: Cache Retrieval

Retrieve the GPS tracker from the unresponsive contractor

name: Crash
